## ProductionTools.useFillingSlotManagement() function

Hook for managing filling slots.

Supports full CRUD operations on filling slots including adding/removing slots, renaming slots, and managing filling options within each slot.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function useFillingSlotManagement(options: IUseFillingSlotManagementOptions): IUseFillingSlotManagementResult;
```

## Parameters

<table><thead><tr><th>

Parameter


</th><th>

Type


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

options


</td><td>

[IUseFillingSlotManagementOptions](./ts-chocolate-ui.iusefillingslotmanagementoptions.md)


</td><td>

Hook configuration


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

[IUseFillingSlotManagementResult](./ts-chocolate-ui.iusefillingslotmanagementresult.md)

Object containing slots state and actions

## Example


```tsx
const { slots, actions, hasChanges } = useFillingSlotManagement({
  baseSlots: baseVersion?.fillings,
  draftSlots: draftVersion?.fillings,
  onUpdateDraft: (slots) => updateDraft({ fillings: slots }),
  onResetDraft: () => updateDraft({ draftVersion: undefined })
});

// Add a new slot
const newSlotId = actions.addSlot('Ganache Layer');

// Select a filling for a slot
actions.selectFilling(slotId, 'filling-001');

// Add a filling option to a slot
actions.addFillingOption(slotId, { type: 'recipe', id: 'filling-002' });
```
